trialDurations.note: Existing long trials are NOT modified by the patch. Only new trial creations are clamped.
trialDurations.futureCleanup: Consider truncating expires_at on existing long trials > 14 days as a one-time migration.

clientPrograms.note: Backfill patch requires client_programs/{userId}_{programId}. If this collection is sparse, the patch may unintentionally block legitimate users — investigate.

purchaseLogs.note: Patch makes POST /purchases admin-only. Existing purchase_logs entries are untouched. If client code calls POST /purchases routinely, that path will start returning 403.

processedPaymentRefunds.note: Existing refunded/charged_back entries were silently logged but never revoked access. Consider a one-time backfill to revoke access on these.

trialUsedField.note: Patch writes trial_used.{courseId} on every new trial. Existing users have no trial_used field — they CAN start a trial after the patch. This is acceptable for first deploy; revisit if needed.

storageDownloadUrl.note: Static analysis required — check apps/pwa/src and apps/creator-dashboard/src for callers.

unverifiedCreators.note: Existing unverified creators retain access — patch only affects NEW /creator/register calls.
